response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience with relevant language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, C#) and some platform/tooling work, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/measurement systems that are central to this Principal-level Growth/Experimentation role. Scale claims (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic) and pricing work hint at relevant adjacencies, but there is no evidence of IC6-caliber cross-team platform leadership in experimentation specifically.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background across required languages (TS, Java, C/C++, C#, Python-adjacent)
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, open-source platform ownership, mentoring/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation, feature-flagging, or A/B testing platforms
Limited evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis depth required for the role
No clear Principal/IC6-scope cross-org leadership translating ambiguous problems into measurable platform outcomes

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering and scale background
